- Isolated files — no import edges between 4 files, cohesion is unmeasurable (reported as 0)

- The prd.json and execution-log.jsonl are append-heavy files that benefit from atomic write patterns; verify all writers go through store/atomic-write.ts

- rex-runtime-state files are consumed via disk reads, not module imports — the zone boundary is logically invisible to static analysis and import-graph enforcement tools. Any linting rules based on import graphs will silently miss cross-zone access to these files.
